title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is OFF
scenario: Share Data toggle does not persist as OFF after app restart when user continues as Guest on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
3. On the account selection screen, tap "Continue as Guest".
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
5. Verify the "Share Data" toggle is displayed and confirm it is in the OFF state.
6. Verify the description text below the toggle is correct.
7. Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Navigate again to App Settings → General → Account.
9. Observe the state of the "Share Data" toggle.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle remains persistently in the OFF state after restarting the app.
